
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F13 main.tex — \documentclass{article} (required: \documentclass{ufdissertation})
      fix: Set \documentclass{ufdissertation} (Fall 2025+ template required).
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f13--document-class-is-ufdissertation

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.

---
Note: Advisory (not a finding): The ufdissertation template produces untagged PDFs (no /StructTreeRoot, /MarkInfo, or /Lang entries). PDF/UA accessibility features such as tag structure, alt-text, table-header semantics, and reading order are therefore outside the scope of this tool's verification. This is a known template limitation, not a violation detected in your submission.
